name: dao-kicad
displayName: DAO KiCad — 归一 PCB 工作台
description: KiCad in your IDE: schematic/PCB viewing, netlist→board build, freerouting autoroute, DRC/ERC and fab outputs — all bridged to the daokicad engine, no KiCad GUI needed.

commands.title: DAO KiCad: 打开归一主页 (Open Home)
DAO KiCad: 打开 Copilot 对话 (Open Chat)
DAO KiCad: 重启桥接服务 (Restart Bridge)

daoKicad.enginePath.description: Path to the dao_kicad engine folder (contains daokicad/ and bridge/). Empty = auto-detect in workspace.

daoKicad.python.description: Python interpreter used to run the bridge server.

daoKicad.port.description: Localhost port for the bridge REST service.
